groups.label: The Persian Empire
groups.explanation: Cyrus the Great, Darius, Persepolis, and Zoroastrianism were all part of the Persian Empire.

groups.label: The Byzantine Empire
groups.explanation: Constantinople, Justinian, the Hagia Sophia, and Orthodox Christianity were all part of the Byzantine Empire.

groups.label: The Maya Civilization
groups.explanation: Chichen Itza, an advanced calendar system, the pyramids of Tikal, and hieroglyphic glyphs were all part of Maya civilization.

groups.label: The Aztec Civilization
groups.explanation: Tenochtitlan, Montezuma, chinampas (floating gardens), and the Sun Stone were all part of Aztec civilization.
